_comment: HopTrack — Sprint 173 — MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers. The Supabase MCP points at hoptrack-staging (NOT the main HopTrack project in us-east-2) per Supabase docs: 'Supabase MCP is only designed for development and testing purposes. It is recommended to not connect to production.' Full setup instructions: docs/claude-code-setup.md

supabase-staging._comment: Supabase MCP — queries hoptrack-staging for schema introspection, migration planning, RLS debugging, and diagnostic SELECTs. Riley/Quinn/Avery are the primary users. Requires SUPABASE_STAGING_URL and SUPABASE_STAGING_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY in your environment or .env.local (gitignored). NEVER point this at HopTrack main (us-east-2).
